home.heroSubtitle: Bridging the gap between photographers and athletes. Discover your photos in seconds through our advanced gallery search.
home.heroDisclaimer: No account needed · Buy in minutes · Instant downloads
home.howItWorksHeadline: From the lens to your gallery, in seconds.
home.howItWorksSubtitle: We connect photographers who love their craft with athletes who live for their passion.
home.pillar1Body: Drag, drop, and start selling. Upload thousands of photos in minutes and let our smart metadata handle the organization for you.
home.pillar2Body: Find your moment. Search by event, location, or time. No more scrolling through endless galleries to find that one perfect shot.
home.pillar3Body: One-click checkout, high-res downloads. Your memories are ready to share the moment the race ends, watermark-free and at full quality.
home.ctaHeadline: Ready to see your events in a new light?
home.ctaSubtitle: Join photographers and talents who use Picdemi to make sure great moments never get lost in someone's camera roll.

checkout.savePhotosDesc: Create a free account to keep all purchased photos in your personal library — no expiry, easy re-download, and AI-powered search to find yourself in new events.

download.linksValid: Links valid for 1 hour (refresh page if expired)
download.noPhotosFound: No photos found for this order.

footer.tagline: Find yourself in every moment. Connect photographers with athletes and event-goers.

profileForm.usernameDesc: Your unique username. This is how others will identify you.
profileForm.displayNameDesc: Your public display name. This is optional and can be different from your username.

earnings.addPaymentAccountDesc: Add a payment method to receive payouts. Your account details are encrypted and secure.
earnings.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this payment account?
earnings.noPaymentAccountsYet: No payment accounts yet. Add one to receive payouts.
earnings.usingCountryFromProfile: Using country from your profile. You can change it if needed.
earnings.errorCountryRequired: Country is required for bank accounts
earnings.payoutProfileBannerDesc: You can sell photos and earn money, but you need to complete your payout profile to request withdrawals. This includes your address and payment method.
